__doc: Per-model floors for the kody-rules gate (occurrence-recall + specificity).
occurrence-recall varies HUGELY by model (35%-72%), so a single flat
threshold is wrong — each model gates against its own floor.
≈ 0.07 over the 43 golden sites), rounded down. specMin stays flat: every
model measured 99-100% specificity, so 95% is a safe shared floor.
Calibrated 2026-07-03 from one full github-cases run (14 cases / 43 sites)
per model. Single run — tighten with more runs. NOTE: gpt-5.4 (40%) and
gemini (35%) are low because kody-rules inherits the bug-finder's
depth-first prompt (a breadth task on a depth brain) — a prompt fix is a
separate follow-up; these floors just stop a regression below today's real.
RATCHET: when a PR intentionally moves a model, refresh its floor here with
